ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  "department_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the department */,
  "department_address" TEXT /* Address of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department offering the course */,
  "sanctioned_strength" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students the course can accommodate */,
  "tuition_fee_per_semester" INTEGER /* Tuition fee per semester */,
  "lab_fee" INTEGER /* Lab fee per semester */,
  "library_fee" INTEGER /* Library fee per semester */,
  "affiliation_fee" INTEGER /* Affiliation fee per semester */,
  "admission_fee" INTEGER /* Fee payable at the time of admission */,
  "semester_fee" INTEGER /* Fee payable at the beginning of each semester (II, III, IV, V, VI) */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course */,
  "coursecredits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_sections" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course section */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course the section belongs to */,
  "section_number" INTEGER /* Section number */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Name of the instructor teaching the section */,
  "section_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students the section can accommodate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the university */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the student is enrolled in */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolling in a course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is enrolling in */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the student is enrolled */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade earned by the student in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the enrollment the grade belongs to */,
  "assignment1_grade" TEXT /* Grade earned on assignment 1 */,
  "assignment2_grade" TEXT /* Grade earned on assignment 2 */,
  "midterm_grade" TEXT /* Grade earned on midterm exam */,
  "final_grade" TEXT /* Grade earned on final exam */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment plan */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student on the payment plan */,
  "plan_type" TEXT /* Type of payment plan (e.g., installment, deferred) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the payment plan */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the payment plan */,
  "total_amount" INTEGER /* Total amount to be paid through the plan */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment plan (e.g., active, completed, canceled) */,
  "number_of_installments" INTEGER /* Number of installments in the plan */,
  "installment_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of each installment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_plans_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment the payment is associated with */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending, refunded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_aid" (
  "financial_aid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial aid award */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student receiving the financial aid */,
  "aid_type" TEXT /* Type of financial aid (e.g., scholarship, grant) */,
  "aid_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the financial aid */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date the financial aid was awarded */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the financial aid (e.g., awarded, pending, declined) */,
  "disbursement_date" TEXT /* Date the financial aid was disbursed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_aid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_aid_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fee_waivers" (
  "waiver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee waiver */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student receiving the fee waiver */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment the fee waiver is associated with */,
  "waiver_type" TEXT /* Type of fee waiver (e.g., tuition, lab) */,
  "waiver_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the fee waiver */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the fee waiver was approved */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the fee waiver (e.g., approved, pending, declined) */,
  "waiver_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the fee waiver expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("waiver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fee_waivers_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fee_waivers_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "refund_requests" (
  "refund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each refund request */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment the refund is associated with */,
  "refund_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the refund */,
  "refund_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the refund request */,
  "refund_status" TEXT /* Status of the refund request (e.g., pending, approved, declined) */,
  "refund_date" TEXT /* Date the refund was processed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("refund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_refund_requests_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)
